name: Tomoe's Offshoot
description: Tomoe's Offshoot was an unnamed fragment of Tomoe created in order to help supervise and collect information regarding the alternate space "Asora". She is the first known fragment created by Tomoe and was predecessor to Komoe.

name: Touko Zaizen

name: Tsukasa Fujii
description: A side character in Kimi no Na wa. He is one of Taki Tachibana's closests friends and is often concerned about him whenever Mitsuha Miyamizu embodies him. Despite teasing Taki, he tries to support him as much as he can. ~!At the end of the movie, he is married to Miki Okudera.!~ (Source: Kimi no Na wa. Wiki)

name: Tsumugi
description: A demon girl who has come to the human world from the hidden world to look for her mother.

name: Ureu Mono
description: The Anguished One is a major character that appears in Devil Survivor 2. The Anguished One has curly white hair and a very pale complexion. He is always squinting, giving him a sleepy appearance and white make-up/eyelashes around his eyes. He wears a red and black striped shirt with a frilled undershirt, having a design similar to the ship possessed by Alioth, along with matching shoes and black pants. In Devil Survivor 2 The Animation character model, his shoes' pattern is different from origin

name: Yaiba Kurogane
description: Yaiba lives with his father, Kenjurou, in the forest. One day, while Yaiba was eating, a troop of gorillas came to attack. Yaiba and his father escaped and hid inside a box, but they didn't know that the box was full of pineapples and was going to be transported into the city. In the city, Yaiba finds out that he is a legendary warrior and has to fight the evil of a demonic looking high-school student named Takeshi Onimaru.
mediaTitles: Case Closed: Conan vs. Kid vs. Yaiba

name: Yasuo
description: An Ionian of deep resolve, Yasuo is an agile swordsman who wields the air itself against his enemies. As a proud young man, he was falsely accused of murdering his master—unable to prove his innocence, he was forced to slay his own brother in self defense. Even after his master's true killer was revealed, Yasuo still could not forgive himself for all he had done, and now wanders his homeland with only the wind to guide his blade.

name: Yoh Komiyama
description: A high school senior of Haruna's who is a year older than her. He knows the ways to impress men from a girl's point of view. Thus, he becomes Haruna's coach to make her more popular among guys. Despite being known as a hottie and being popular among girls, he does not acknowledge this fact. He is quite embarrassed about his popularity. He gets shy easily especially when he is praised. During his childhood days, he was a difficult child. He never smiled in photographs. However, she was accused of being a fake and hung herself, bringing shame to her family and horrifying Yuriko who believed in her. Ever since, Yuriko has been keen to prove the existence of psychics, finally having the answer in Haruka. description: Zenos yae Galvus is one of the central antagonists of Final Fantasy XIV . He is arrogant, selfish, and callous.
